title: Build and Run a Query
overview: A complex SOQL query is built in the Query component using schema-aware UI prompts, without requiring users to know SOQL syntax. After running, results display with pagination, mapped labels (instead of API names), column filters, mass edit/delete, inline edit, download, new record, and row-level view/update/clone/delete actions.
generalUseCase: Designed for every Salesforce user, DSP’s Query component lets you build SOQL queries with schema-aware suggestions—no syntax required—and work with finely polished, action-ready results directly in Lightning Experience. It runs natively as an LWC, keeping data in Salesforce while meeting enterprise-grade security standards.
